title: oenothera ammophila subsp. germanica
intro: Oenothera ammophila subsp. germanica, also known as evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid. The medicinal properties of evening primrose have been associated with reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as improving skin health and wound healing. Herbal preparations of evening primrose include capsules, oils, and creams, which are often used to support skin health, cardiovascular health, and reproductive health.
